---
title: "test_sentinel_perf_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_sentinel_perf_empire.py"
loc: 18
complexity: 1
logic_score: 7.58
style_score: 3.68
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.11
---

## Intent
The `test_sentinel_perf_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_sentinel_perf_metrics, test_sentinel_perf_suite. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_sentinel_perf_metrics, test_sentinel_perf_suite. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.sentinel_perf](file://src.tools.sentinel_perf)

### Exports
- `test_sentinel_perf_metrics`
- `test_sentinel_perf_suite`
